rag_rules: Use assign only for implementation-level output feature bindings in implementation annexes.
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Fix unresolved identifiers by referencing only visible AADL features or declared helpers.
Validate AGREE expressions for type consistency before deployment.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must reside within annex agree blocks.
Implementation annexes are for bindings, not guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponents in type annex guarantees.
Do not add architecture to resolve AGREE type errors; fix the root cause.
